---
title: "Discussion"
---

## Interpretation

What do the results mean? Connect them back to the research question stated
in Chapter 1.

## Theoretical implications

How do your findings extend, challenge, or refine the theoretical frameworks
identified in Chapter 2?

## Practical / policy implications

If your work has practical applications — for educators, clinicians, policy
makers, practitioners — discuss them here.

## Limitations + future work

Be specific. What questions does your work leave open? What would the next
study in this line look like?
